schedule.dialogue: Good morning! The town is thriving thanks to you.
I'm reviewing the town records. Building projects look good!
Lunch break! The inn's stew is excellent today.
Just taking a stroll through the town square.
Evening already? Time flies when the town is busy.
Good night. The town is safe in your hands.

default: The town has grown so much lately!
Your dungeon expeditions bring us great prosperity.
I've heard tales of your deeds. The town is proud.
You're the hero this town has always needed.
festival: The festival preparations are going well!
I hope you'll join us for the celebration.
high_affection: I consider you a true friend of this town.
